location: Dropped by Necromancer Garris, an enemy fought behind an illusory wall inside the treasure room of Sage's Cave (a separate encounter from the cave's other optional fight, a Black Knife Assassin).
region: Altus Plateau (Sage's Cave, south of Wyndham Ruins)
tactics: Sage's Cave sits in the western cliffs of Altus Plateau, reachable from Abandoned Coffin grace
Watch for illusory walls — Garris's fog gate is hidden behind one in the loot room, not out in the open
He fights with ranged sorceries and summons — close the distance quickly to avoid being kited
Don't confuse this with the cave's other fog gate, which leads to a separate Black Knife Assassin fight
lore: A disturbing personal weapon — three copper flail-heads shaped by Necromancer Garris to resemble the faces of his dead wife and children, turning private grief into an instrument of violence.

builds.name: Dex/Int hybrid
builds.why: Scaling shifts toward Dexterity/Intelligence as it's upgraded — suits a caster-melee hybrid build
